'''Sonic scalpels''' were used by [[Doctor/Legends|surgeons]] to cut away [[Death/Legends|dead]] flesh.

==Description==
Sonic scalpels were medical tools intended and could be used during emergency field surgery.<ref name="EGWT" /> The device was used to cut away dead tissue, a necessary procedure for some wounds to prevent developing a necrotic infection.<ref name="Tempest">''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''</ref> Sonic scalpels were included in [[Medpac/Legends|medpacs]], including [[BioTech Industries/Legends|Biotech Industries']] [[FastFlesh medpac/Legends|FastFlesh medpac]].<ref name="EGWT" /> 

==History==
[[Ula Vii]] used a sonic scalpel to clear away the fused flesh and [[Plastoid/Legends|plastoid]] that had been left behind after [[Larin Moxla]] had four fingers severed and cauterized by a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].<ref name="Fatal Alliance">''[[The Old Republic: Fatal Alliance]]''</ref>

[[Lalu Morwan]] used a sonic scalpel to treat [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] injured arm aboard the ''[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]]''.<ref name="Tempest" />
